message:
test(engine): add enrichment batch 4 tests across 16 core modules

Add comprehensive test enrichment covering clone independence, serde
round-trip edge cases, stress scenarios, replay determinism, boundary
conditions, Display/Debug agreement, and ordering invariants across
16 engine modules (~9,960 new test lines, ~616 new #[test] functions).

Modules enriched:

- alloc_domain (40 tests): DomainBudget and DomainConfig clone
  independence, budget exhaustion stress, zero-budget edge cases,
  serde round-trip with maximum u64 values
- benchmark_denominator (52 tests): denominator arithmetic boundary
  conditions, clone independence for benchmark results, serde stability
  for all metric types
- bulkhead (45 tests): BulkheadConfig serde with boundary values (0,
  usize::MAX), BulkheadEvent serde with empty strings, pressure
  threshold edge cases, concurrent permit stress
- cancel_mask (40 tests): mask composition clone independence, serde
  round-trip for all mask variants, empty/full mask boundary behavior
- capability_token (52 tests): PrincipalId/CheckpointRef/RevocationRef
  clone independence, token verification with boundary timestamps,
  Display/Debug agreement for error types
- catastrophic_tail_tournament_gate (50 tests): tournament bracket
  evaluation edge cases, serde stability for gate results, adversarial
  input boundary conditions
- counterfactual_replay_engine (18 tests): replay determinism under
  varied seeds, counterfactual branch divergence detection, serde
  round-trip for replay events
- deterministic_serde (34 tests): canonical serialization stability,
  key ordering invariants, round-trip with nested structures containing
  special characters and Unicode
- epoch_invalidation (36 tests): epoch boundary transitions, invalidation
  cascade clone independence, serde with maximum epoch values
- interleaving_explorer (50 tests): RaceSurface/Scenario clone
  independence, explorer stress with high task counts, serde for all
  operation/severity types
- module_resolver (26 tests): resolution path edge cases, serde for
  resolver configuration, clone independence for resolution results
- moonshot_contract (66 tests): contract evaluation with boundary
  thresholds, serde stability for all contract variants, clone
  independence for contract state
- obligation_channel (30 tests): channel capacity edge cases, serde
  for obligation events, clone independence for channel state
- obligation_leak_policy (44 tests): leak detection with zero/max
  thresholds, policy clone independence, serde for policy configuration
- reproducibility_provenance_pack (33 tests): pack composition serde,
  clone independence for provenance entries, hash stability
- succinct_witness_compiler (49 tests): witness compilation boundary
  conditions, serde round-trip for compiled witnesses, clone
  independence for compiler state

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
